rationale: BSON spec requires null-terminated strings; driver ignores the terminating byte rather than rejecting corrupt BSON.
Extended JSON spec requires 't' field before 'i' in $timestamp; driver accepts wrong field order and silently swaps values.

CI configuration migration to Evergreen matrix; build/CI plumbing with no driver behavior change.

API ergonomics improvement to support primitive wrapper types in BSON encode/decode; not a spec conformance issue.
GridFS performance improvement using bulk chunk fetch; internal optimization with no spec rule contradicted.
Feature request for DBCursor.count(foundOnly); PHP and Python mentioned as background context, not as a behavioral divergence bug.
Error differentiation improvement for write/getLastError failures; API ergonomics, no specific spec rule violated.
Async MongoClient.close() lacks synchronous completion callback; API ergonomics issue, no specific CMAP spec rule contradicted.

Javadoc improvement for Decimal128 class; documentation change with no driver behavior impact.
Removing obsolete getLastError references from Javadoc; documentation cleanup only.
Long overflow bug when server selection timeout is negative; implementation arithmetic bug, no specific spec rule about timeout overflow behavior.
Race condition NPE when closing DefaultConnectionPool; concurrency implementation bug, no specific CMAP spec rule contradicted.
NPE in createIndex when database name contains a period; input validation bug, no spec rule about database naming violated.
NPE when null ServerAddress in list; input validation bug, no spec behavior contradicted.
Improving internal BSON test coverage using BsonHelper; test quality improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Unintentional runtime dependency on Netty introduced; dependency/packaging bug, no spec behavior involved.
Max staleness spec update implementation; Depends on DRIVERS-335 indicating spec-mandated behavior change in server selection.
IllegalStateException when heartbeat elapsed time is exactly 0ns; implementation assertion too strict, not a specific SDAM spec rule about timing.
BSON spec requires regex flags to be alphabetically ordered; driver did not enforce this ordering. Depends on DRIVERS-331.
getAllAddress returns auto-discovered nodes instead of only seed list nodes; API behavior regression, no spec rule about this method.
Closing a cursor that throws leaves it in bad state; concurrency/state management bug, no specific cursor spec rule contradicted.
distinct() throws when field contains nulls; CRUD implementation type-handling bug, no spec rule specifically about null results in distinct.
Server selection spec requires minimum maxStalenessSeconds of 90s; driver not enforcing this minimum. Depends on DRIVERS-340.
Max staleness validity checks must apply even in primaryPreferred when primary available; server selection spec requirement.
Resyncing CRUD spec test files; test infrastructure update. Depends on DRIVERS-332.
User support question about cursor not found exception; resolved as expected behavior, not a spec conformance issue.
RFC 4752 requires MAX_BUFFER=0 when no security layer supported; JDK default violates this causing GSSAPI failure against Windows servers.
Adding equals/hashCode/toString to BsonElement; API improvement with no spec rule contradicted.
Javadoc default value formatting inconsistency; documentation improvement only.
Extended JSON spec defines $binary $type as hex string; old JSON.parse expects Integer causing ClassCastException.
Incorrect error message when requesting 0 items from Observable; error message wording bug only.
X.509 auth spec allows omitting username since MongoDB 3.4; driver silently ignores authMechanism in connection string without username.
Reference documentation contains wrong code sample (async instead of sync); documentation error only.
Connection string uses String.endsWith instead of String.equals for authMechanismProperties comparison; wrong parsing logic violating spec.
Typo in GSSAPI connection string example in documentation; docs fix only.
Duplicate package-info.java in sources uber-jar; build/packaging issue with no driver behavior impact.
Feature request for MongoClientURI builder API; API ergonomics improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Java generic type variance improvement for List<? extends Bson>; language ergonomics, no spec rule contradicted.
BasicDBList serialized as document instead of array via Updates.set; codec mapping bug, no specific BSON spec rule named.
IterableCodec NPE decoding nested arrays; internal codec implementation bug, no specific BSON spec rule contradicted.
Server selection spec prohibits selecting arbiters for read operations; driver selects arbiter with nearest read preference causing errors.
